title: boronia pancheri
intro: Boronia pancheri, also known as the Tahitian boronia, is a flowering plant species native to the island of Tahiti in French Polynesia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Polynesian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of boronia pancheri include its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, wounds, and burns, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Boronia pancheri is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, creams, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
